name: Armored Advance

passives.name: Plating
passives.effects: Reduces all incoming {{tip|basic damage}} by 10% (''excluding from [[turret]] attacks'').

passives.name: Noxian Endurance
passives.effects: Taking {{as|physical damage}} from champions grants you a {{tip|shield}} that absorbs {{pp|100 to 200|color=pd}} {{as|(+ 8% '''bonus''' health)}} {{as|physical damage}} for 5 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Reduce incoming basic damage by 10% (excluding turrets).
Taking physical damage from champions grants a shield (100-200 + 8% bonus health) for 5s. Cooldown 15s.

simpleDescription: Deal damage to empower your heals and shields

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Plating is always-on and applies only to incoming basic damage while explicitly excluding turret attacks.
Execution model: Noxian Endurance triggers from incoming physical champion damage and grants a 5-second physical-damage-only shield on a 15-second cooldown.
Player-visible behavior: this item is obtained by mid-lane role-quest boot upgrade (Plated Steelcaps -> Armored Advance) rather than direct purchase flow.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
